description: Cross-runtime contract aligned with armaraos crates ainl-contracts, ainl-repo-intel, ainl-context-freshness, ainl-impact-policy.
notes: AINL MCP does not compute repo git-HEAD staleness; it emits context_freshness=unknown unless ARMARAOS/AINL extensions provide signals in the future.
Repo-intelligence tools (GitNexus-class) live in external MCP hosts; this contract names enums only.
